title: Word Formation: The History of Photography

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text: People have always wanted to capture the world around them, but for centuries this was impossible. The 1.1. _________ of photography in the early nineteenth century finally changed that. A French 1.2. _________ named Joseph Nicephore Niepce produced the first lasting image around 1826, though it required an extremely long 1.3. _________ of about eight hours. His partner, Louis Daguerre, made the process far quicker and turned it into a 1.4. _________ technique that spread across Europe. Early cameras were big and heavy, so they were 1.5. _________ to carry from place to place. Capturing a clear picture also depended on the 1.6. _________ of the light, because dim rooms gave dull results. Later, glass plates were 1.7. _________ by flexible film, which was much lighter and simpler to use. The 1.8. _________ that light could leave a permanent mark on certain surfaces lay behind every step of this remarkable story.
